case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. KEATLEY CAR CARE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT KEATLEY CAR CARE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA KEATLEY DETAIL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
